name: Potato Soup for Crockpot
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Flour mixed with 1/4 cup Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ingredients 1 through 6 in the crockpot.
2. Cook on low to medium heat all day.
3. About half an hour to one hour before serving, add milk and flour-water mixture.
4. Continue cooking until the soup thickens.
5. Serve hot.
6. Optional: Add 1/4 pound of Velveeta cheese for a cheesy potato soup.
7. Alternatively, use evaporated milk instead of regular milk.
